'''âd-f-m''' ('''kadafam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yaffle|yaffle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-f-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yaffle|yaffle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-f-m
|-
! Lemma
| kadafam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidafam|thidafam]] || [[word:jidafam|jidafam]] || [[word:shidafam|shidafam]] || [[word:kidafam|kidafam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudafam|thuthudafam]] || [[word:jujudafam|jujudafam]] || [[word:shushudafam|shushudafam]] || [[word:kukudafam|kukudafam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudafam|thudafam]] || [[word:judafam|judafam]] || [[word:shudafam|shudafam]] || [[word:kudafam|kudafam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudafam|thudafam]] || [[word:judafam|judafam]] || [[word:shudafam|shudafam]] || [[word:kudafam|kudafam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedafam|thedafam]] || [[word:jedafam|jedafam]] || [[word:shedafam|shedafam]] || [[word:kedafam|kedafam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodafam|thothodafam]] || [[word:jojodafam|jojodafam]] || [[word:shoshodafam|shoshodafam]] || [[word:kokodafam|kokodafam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodafam|thodafam]] || [[word:jodafam|jodafam]] || [[word:shodafam|shodafam]] || [[word:kodafam|kodafam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodafam|thodafam]] || [[word:jodafam|jodafam]] || [[word:shodafam|shodafam]] || [[word:kodafam|kodafam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚdafam|thĂŚdafam]] || [[word:jĂŚdafam|jĂŚdafam]] || [[word:shĂŚdafam|shĂŚdafam]] || [[word:kĂŚdafam|kĂŚdafam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadafam|thathadafam]] || [[word:jajadafam|jajadafam]] || [[word:shashadafam|shashadafam]] || [[word:kakadafam|kakadafam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadafam|thadafam]] || [[word:jadafam|jadafam]] || [[word:shadafam|shadafam]] || [[word:kadafam|kadafam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadafam|thadafam]] || [[word:jadafam|jadafam]] || [[word:shadafam|shadafam]] || [[word:kadafam|kadafam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadafam|shadafam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadafam|goshadafam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadafam|gokishadafam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadafamnĂź|shadafamnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadafamnknĂź|goshadafamnknĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadafamnĂź|gokishadafamnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadafamshĂŤ|shadafamshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadafamnkshĂŤ|goshadafamnkshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadafamshĂŤ|gokishadafamshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadafamro|shadafamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadafamnkro|goshadafamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadafamro|gokishadafamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadafamu|shadafamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadafamnkmu|goshadafamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadafamu|gokishadafamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadafamsher|shadafamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadafamnksher|goshadafamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadafamsher|gokishadafamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadafamng|shadafamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadafamnkng|goshadafamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadafamng|gokishadafamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadafamya|shadafamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadafamnkya|goshadafamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadafamya|gokishadafamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadafamyam|shadafamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadafamnkyam|goshadafamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadafamyam|gokishadafamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadafamnĂźshĂŤ|shadafamnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadafamnknĂźshĂŤ|goshadafamnknĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadafamnĂźshĂŤ|gokishadafamnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadafamnĂźro|shadafamnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadafamnknĂźro|goshadafamnknĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadafamnĂźro|gokishadafamnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadafamnĂźmu|shadafamnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadafamnknĂźmu|goshadafamnknĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadafamnĂźmu|gokishadafamnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadafamshĂŤnĂź|shadafamshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadafamnkshĂŤnĂź|goshadafamnkshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadafamshĂŤnĂź|gokishadafamshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadafamshĂŤro|shadafamshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadafamnkshĂŤro|goshadafamnkshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadafamshĂŤro|gokishadafamshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadafamshĂŤmu|shadafamshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadafamnkshĂŤmu|goshadafamnkshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadafamshĂŤmu|gokishadafamshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadafamronĂź|shadafamronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadafamnkronĂź|goshadafamnkronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadafamronĂź|gokishadafamronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadafamroshĂŤ|shadafamroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadafamnkroshĂŤ|goshadafamnkroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadafamroshĂŤ|gokishadafamroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadafamromu|shadafamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadafamnkromu|goshadafamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadafamromu|gokishadafamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadafamunĂź|shadafamunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadafamnkmunĂź|goshadafamnkmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadafamunĂź|gokishadafamunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadafamushĂŤ|shadafamushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadafamnkmushĂŤ|goshadafamnkmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadafamushĂŤ|gokishadafamushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadafamuro|shadafamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadafamnkmuro|goshadafamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadafamuro|gokishadafamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
